home.title: Aurion
home.subtitle: Lead a small nation to global supremacy
home.emptyHint: Start a new game to see it here.

stepScenario.title: Choose a scenario
stepScenario.description: The scenario defines the world, nations and tech tree.

stepCountry.title: Choose your country
stepCountry.description: You will start as the head of state of this nation.

stepDifficulty.title: Choose difficulty
stepDifficulty.description: Tune the challenge before you begin. Each preset shows what changes.
stepDifficulty.ironManWarning: Iron Man mode: no autosave, one shot only. A defeat ends the game.

gameMode.title: Choose a game mode
gameMode.description: Decides when (and whether) the game can end. You'll feel the difference within the first hours.

classic.name: Classic
classic.description: Win once, game over. The traditional flow: meet your victory condition and you're done.

eternal.name: Eternal
eternal.description: Never ends. Victories become milestones; you keep playing as long as you want. 30 minutes or dozens of hours — your call.

era-paced.name: Era-paced
era-paced.description: The run advances through narrative eras; every transition opens a chapter screen. Available only for scenarios that declare eras (Mondo Contemporaneo, Guerra Fredda).

dethrone.name: Dethrone
dethrone.description: Become #1 and hold the throne: drop out of the top 3 for 5 years and you lose. For players who want tension even after winning.
dethrone.isolationUnavailable: This scenario doesn't support the isolation trigger; you'll only win or lose by GDP rank.

disclaimer.nuclearWarfare: This scenario includes nuclear warfare mechanics, including civilian consequences and MAD exchanges.

ironMan.tooltip: Saves are disabled. A single defeat ends the run for good.
ironMan.menuHint: Disabled in Iron Man — you can only save once the run ends.
ironMan.exitWarning: Iron Man has no autosave. Leaving now abandons the run permanently.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.ticksAgo: {n, plural, one {1 week ago} other {# weeks ago}}

reputation.title: Bloc reputation — details
reputation.unavailable: The active scenario doesn't track bloc reputation.

exitGame.title: Exit the game?
exitGame.description: Unsaved changes will be lost. Return to the home screen?

nuclearDismantle.title: Dismantle the nuclear arsenal?
nuclearDismantle.descriptionTreaty: You will dismantle every warhead. With the active non-proliferation treaty you receive the full reputation boost (+30 per warhead). The action is irreversible.
nuclearDismantle.descriptionNoTreaty: You will dismantle every warhead. Without an active non-proliferation treaty the reputation boost is halved (+15 per warhead). The action is irreversible.

lossReason.popularity: Popularity stayed too low for too long: the government was overthrown.
lossReason.bankruptcy: The treasury stayed empty for too long: the nation went bankrupt.
lossReason.occupation: Your capital was occupied by an enemy power.
lossReason.factionRevolt: Every faction withdrew its support: a coup d'état.
lossReason.dethroned: You stayed out of the GDP top 3 for 5 straight years: dethroned by rival powers.
lossReason.isolated: Your reputation collapsed below -50 in every bloc for 5 years: completely isolated.

eternalFirstVictory.title: First victory unlocked!
eternalFirstVictory.body: You met the "{condition}" condition. In Eternal mode the run never ends — keep playing and rack up more victories. From here on, milestones surface as discreet bottom-right toasts.

stats.ariaLabel: Summary of the era that just ended

step1.title: Warning — Nuclear strike
step1.body: You are about to launch a nuclear weapon. The consequences are permanent and devastating. Continue?

tactical.warChain: Very high probability of cascading war declarations from the target's allies.
tactical.aftermath: Global tension +30 and an automatic UN condemnation.

strategic.warChain: Every nation with moderate aggression will declare war on you.
strategic.aftermath: Global tension +60, UN condemnation, possible nuclear winter on MAD.

step1.helper: You have 3 seconds to read before Continue becomes available. Cancel is always there.

step2.title: Final confirmation
step2.body: Once launched, this cannot be undone. Do you really want to proceed?

mad.warning: The target possesses nuclear weapons: MAD (Mutual Assured Destruction) risk.

nuclearStrikeIncoming.title: Nuclear strike inbound

body.tactical: {attacker} has launched a tactical nuclear strike on one of your regions.
body.strategic: {attacker} has launched a strategic nuclear strike on your nation.

tactical.population: The target region is devastated: millions of estimated casualties.
tactical.economy: Every deployment in the region is destroyed.
tactical.aftermath: National popularity −30. Automatic UN condemnation against the attacker.

strategic.population: Your capital and industrial centres are in ruins.
strategic.economy: GDP halved, treasury collapsed, popularity zeroed.
strategic.aftermath: Nuclear winter and global crisis: the world will never be the same.

nuclearStrikeIncoming.helper: There is nothing you can do to undo this strike: it has already happened.

history.title: Income trend
history.label: Weekly income trend
history.empty: Collecting data… income will appear over the next ticks.
history.note: Shows the last ~12 observations while this panel is open.

active.title: Active research
active.empty: No active research. Start one below.

disabled.otherActive: A research is already in progress.

panelSpaceRace.title: Space race
panelSpaceRace.noMilestones: This scenario doesn't track space milestones.
panelSpaceRace.notYetAchieved: No nation has reached this milestone yet.

nuclear.warningPermanent: The use of nuclear weapons has permanent consequences.

dismantle.boostFull: Non-proliferation treaty active: full reputation boost (+{perWarhead} per warhead, total +{total}).
dismantle.boostHalved: No active treaty: boost halved (+{perWarhead} per warhead, total +{total}).

composer.title: Launch operation
composer.noEligibleTargets: No targets with sufficient intel. Add spies to gather intelligence.
composer.noStealable: The target has no technology you lack.

reason.attitudeTooLow: Attitude too low for an alliance.

war.title: Declare war?
war.description: This action is irreversible and will trigger diplomatic and military consequences.

panelUN.title: UN council
panelUN.unavailable: UN not available in this scenario.

kindDescription.sanctions: Impose economic sanctions on a target nation.
kindDescription.peacekeeping: Deploy blue helmets in a contested region.
kindDescription.recognition: Diplomatically recognise a new state or government.
kindDescription.climate: Sign on to a global climate accord.
kindDescription.nonProliferation: Ban new weapons of mass destruction.

propose.title: Propose resolution
propose.notCouncil: Only permanent council members can propose resolutions.

veto.title: Cast a veto?
veto.description: Vetoing blocks the resolution but costs −10 reputation in every active bloc. Proceed?

economic.name: Economic victory
economic.description: Become the world's largest economy by GDP.

military.name: Military victory
military.description: Defeat or subjugate every credible rival.

scientific.name: Scientific victory
scientific.description: Complete the space programme and out-tech the world.

diplomatic.name: Diplomatic victory
diplomatic.description: Build an alliance network spanning the globe.

easy.name: Easy
easy.description: Less aggressive AI, +30% starting income, softer negative events. Great to learn the ropes.

normal.name: Normal
normal.description: Reference balance. A fair challenge with no concessions.

hard.name: Hard
hard.description: AI gangs up on the leader, your income shrinks and loss counters move faster.

ironMan.name: Iron Man
ironMan.description: Like Hard, but with no autosave or manual saves. One shot only.

ascesa-aurion.name: Rise of Aurion
ascesa-aurion.description: The flagship campaign: a small industrial republic caught between great-power ambitions.

quick-start.name: Quick Start
quick-start.description: Eight nations in one region. A tutorial-lite run, 10–20 real minutes.

mondo-contemporaneo.name: Contemporary World
mondo-contemporaneo.description: Fictional 2026. Inherit a middle power and try to climb to the global top.

guerra-fredda.name: Cold War
guerra-fredda.description: Fictional 1962. Bipolar world, decolonisation, space race.

victoryScreen.dethroned: You stayed out of the GDP top 3 for 5 straight years: dethroned by rival powers.
victoryScreen.isolated: Your reputation collapsed below -50 in every bloc for 5 years: completely isolated.

errors.engineNotReady: The game engine is not yet available.
errors.newGameFailed: Failed to start a new game.
errors.quotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Export a game or free up space.
errors.alreadyAtWar: You are already at war with this nation.
errors.notAtWar: You are not at war with this nation.
errors.researchInProgress: A research is already in progress.
errors.saveLocked: Saves are locked in Iron Man mode.
errors.wave10NotImplemented: Nuclear feature not yet wired up: the engine will land it shortly.

un.notCouncil: Only council members may take this action.
un.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this resolution.
un.votingClosed: Voting on this resolution has closed.

play.placeholderMap: MAP — to be implemented in Wave 2
play.placeholderPanels: PANELS — to be implemented in Wave 2
play.placeholderNotifications: NOTIFICATIONS — to be implemented in Wave 2

overlay.label: Overlay layer
overlay.blocsUnavailable: This scenario does not use the bloc system

tutorial.title: Welcome to Aurion

intro.body: Aurion is a real-time strategy game: the world keeps moving, but you can pause whenever you need to plan. Let's give you a quick tour of the essential controls — it takes under a minute.

tutorial.footerNote: Press ESC at any time to advance to the next step.

hud.title: The top bar
hud.body: Here you'll find the current date, your treasury, popularity, and the speed controls. Keep an eye on these numbers — they're your main health indicators.

map.title: The world map
map.body: Click a nation to select it; hover for a quick summary. The buttons below the map toggle informational overlays: tension, alliances, and intelligence.

panels.title: The system panels
panels.body: On the left you have the six game panels: Economy, Research, Military, Spies, Diplomacy, Politics. The active one is highlighted in amber.

speed.title: Control time
speed.body: Pause, 1×, 2×, and 4× set the game speed. Spacebar is a shortcut: it toggles pause and play when you aren't typing in a field.

outro.title: That's it!
outro.body: You've seen the essentials. The game will resume at 1× speed as soon as you close this window. Have fun.

first_century.name: A century in power
first_century.description: Govern for 100 weeks without losing the game.

peace_through_strength.name: Peace through strength
peace_through_strength.description: Win three wars by securing enemy territory.

coalition_builder.name: Coalition builder
coalition_builder.description: Hold three alliances at the same time.

top3_economy.name: Rising power
top3_economy.description: Reach the top 3 economies by GDP.

global_alliance.name: Global alliance
global_alliance.description: Hold five alliances at the same time.

warlord.name: Warlord
warlord.description: Win five wars across all your runs.

scorched_earth.name: Scorched Earth
scorched_earth.desc: You launched your first nuclear weapon. History will judge you.

mutually_assured.name: Mutually Assured
mutually_assured.desc: You survived a MAD exchange. The world will never be the same.

disarmer.name: Disarmer
disarmer.desc: You dismantled your entire nuclear arsenal under UN treaty.

reason.unVoteSanctionsWesternYes: UN: voted yes on sanctions vs Western
reason.unVoteSanctionsEasternYes: UN: voted yes on sanctions vs Eastern
reason.unVoteHumanitarianYes: UN: voted yes on humanitarian aid
reason.unVoteHumanitarianNo: UN: voted no on humanitarian aid
reason.unVoteClimateYes: UN: voted yes on climate accord
